content: 📎 **Cartillier wins WSOPC Aix-en-Provence (€150K)** — PokerNews / article hero / C-BLOCK — Cinderella beat, 3rd career cash = gold ring.
📎 Tim Cook stepping down — Apple Newsroom / article header / B Block (Cook → Ternus transition Sept 1, AAPL slipped under $4T market cap)
📎 Wemby concussion Game 2 — ESPN / article header / B Block (Wemby fell face-first, NBA concussion protocol, Spurs lost 106-103, series tied 1-1)
📎 NFL Draft tomorrow in Pittsburgh — ESPN / draft news page / A Block
📎 Schlittler death threats after Hurkacz match — NBC News / article header / B Block

📎 **[A BLOCK] — Matusow "Mirage" → Chidwick Reply**
<https://www.pokernews.com/news/2026/04/mike-matusow-high-roller-poker-earnings-claim-51081.htm>
PokerNews write-up covering Matusow's "high-roller earnings are fake" claim + the on-record replies from Seth Davies (~50% own action typical), **Chidwick ($5–10M profit on $76M cashes)**, Shaun Deeb ("Peters' problems aren't poker losses"), Josh Arieh. This is the A-block source — every talking point references it. Conrad: pull the quoted tweet screenshots from here for the side-by-side graphic.

📎 **[A BLOCK] — Linde/Peters Original Thread (setup context)**
Original Dylan Linde accusation thread on X — @DylanLinde. Peters owes ~$25K of a $50K Triton staking loss, paid half. This is the spark that Matusow escalated off of. Background only; don't lead with it on stream.

📎 **[B BLOCK] — WSOPC Texas Schedule (TCH Austin)**
<https://x.com/tjreidpoker>
Terrance Reid's X post (~1.9K impressions in ~10h) with the official 12-day WSOP Circuit Austin schedule. Thursday Apr 23 – May 4. $600 Mini Main $500K GTD, $400 Ladies, $400 Monster, full mixed slate. Jeff Platt confirms he's on the ground. This is the B-block lead visual — Conrad, pull the schedule image for the schedule infographic.

📎 **[B BLOCK] — USPO Event #10 ($25.6K Championship tonight)**
<https://www.pgt.com/us-poker-open>
Official PGT USPO page. Wilson is points leader; 7 different winners through 9 events. Reference for Wilson's PGT title pace (Andy prep flag).

📎 **[B BLOCK context] — Lodge civil-forfeiture status**
No new filing today; The Lodge still shuttered / $2M frozen under TABC civil forfeiture case. Use Apr 14 ROS coverage for historical framing. Conrad: for the split-screen graphic, use a neutral Lodge exterior shot (archive) + TCH Austin branding.

📎 **[C BLOCK Item 1] — Aram Zobian wins USPO Event #9**
<https://www.pokernews.com/news/2026/04/aram-zobian-wins-uspo-event-9-51083.htm>
Full recap + photo. Zobian $292,800, heads-up K♠6♠ vs A♥9♥ (paired-sixes board), beats Brandon Wilson. FT: Rheem 3rd, Gierse 4th, Seward 5th. Includes the Natna Children's Foundation backstory (Tigray, Ethiopia). Conrad: pull the Zobian winner photo + any Natna Foundation reference image.

📎 **[C BLOCK Item 2] — Hellmuth's Home Game Ep 20 recap ("quads" moment)**
<https://www.pokernews.com/news/2026/04/hellmuths-home-game-episode-20-recap-51082.htm>
CBS Sports airing Apr 21. $25/$50 cash at Grand Sierra Resort, Reno. Lineup includes Phil, P3, Matusow (cross-ref for A block). P3 +$27,925, 3Coin Sadler -$39K. Headline clip: *"When you're the greatest, you make quads."* Conrad: pull the quads-moment clip from the CBS cut — audio up on Hellmuth's line.

📎 **[C BLOCK Item 3] — Wemby concussion (biggest sportsbook event of the bracket)**
<http://www.espn.com/nba/>
ESPN recap — Wemby face-first fall in Q2, concussion protocol, Spurs lose 106-103. Scoot 31. Polymarket board: <https://polymarket.com/markets/sports> — Thunder 92% vs Suns tonight (Game 2, 10p ET), OKC 51% title favorite. Conrad: need the Wemby fall clip + Polymarket board screenshot.

📎 **[C BLOCK Item 4] — Matthieu Cartillier wins WSOPC Aix-en-Provence**
<https://www.pokernews.com/news/2026/04/poker-player-s-third-tournament-cash-is-for-a-wsopc-main-eve-51087.htm>
€150K for €1,500 buy-in. 783 entries, €1.01M pool. Cartillier's 3rd-ever cash is a gold ring. 30-sec Cinderella beat (cut first if time).

🖼️ **MATUSOW MIRAGE vs. CHIDWICK REPLY — Show Graphic**
A BLOCK cold open / best-clip dual quote card. Matusow's accusation + Chidwick's receipts.

🖼️ **WSOPC TEXAS DEBUT — Show Graphic**
B BLOCK open. First-ever WSOP Circuit in Texas (Apr 23–May 4) at TCH Austin. Red sub-bar carries the Lodge-still-frozen contrast.

🖼️ **ZOBIAN USPO EVENT #9 — Show Graphic**
C BLOCK Item 1. Aram Zobian wins USPO Event #9 ($292,800) — heads-up hand callout (K♠6♠ vs A♥9♥, paired-sixes board) + final-table context.

🖼️ **NATNA FOUNDATION — Show Graphic**
C BLOCK Item 1 sub-card. The story behind the win — Natna Children's Foundation, co-founded by Aram Zobian. Pairs with the USPO results card.

🖼️ **POLYMARKET PULSE — Show Graphic**
Recurring-segment 4-quadrant card, as of 3am PT · Apr 22. NBA 51% · Stanley Cup 25% · 2026 World Cup Spain 16% · ATP Sinner 56%.

🖼️ **COOK HANDS OFF APPLE — Show Graphic**
World Intel — A Block cutaway. $4T market cap + Tim Cook → John Ternus succession (announced Apr 20).

🖼️ **HIGH ROLLER CASHES ≠ PROFITS — Show Graphic**
A BLOCK. 3-row receipts card: Chidwick $76M cashes / $5–10M profit · Peters $49.65M / ~$25K of $50K Triton stake · Davies ~50% typical hold.

🖼️ **BTC SPOT CHECK — Show Graphic**
World Intel — Investing/culture cutaway. BTC spot $78,000, Apr 22 morning. Flag vs. 30-day trend.

🖼️ **KALSHI SUSPENDS 3 CONGRESSIONAL CANDIDATES — Show Graphic**
B BLOCK open. Breaking-news alert frame for the prediction-market integrity segment. CNBC, Apr 23.

🖼️ **DeBOER · 7 YEARS · $87.5M — Show Graphic**
C BLOCK lead. Alabama extends Kalen DeBoer — contract-value-first data card. ESPN, Apr 23.

🖼️ **KRISTEN FOXEN'S APRIL — Show Graphic**
A BLOCK lead. Side-by-side dual hand: Filthy Bluff (A♣8♠ vs T♥5♥ on 6♣9♣5♠A♦T♠, 1.2M shove=fold) + Trip Queens Fold (Foxen folds trips to Coleman's pair of sixes). USPO $25K finale.

📎 COLD OPEN — "She didn't say nothin... she just had that look." — r/rareinsults / 24.6k upvotes, #24 r/all today — hold full-screen 3 sec before Matt on camera. Source: intel-staging msg 1496832685279150211
